hero.title: Nts'etsopele ea Software ea Khoebo
hero.description: Lits'ebetso tsa khoebo tsa ho qetela tse nang le meralo ea sejoale-joale, meralo ea pele ea API, le scalability ea leru.

problem.title: Bothata ba Khoebo
problem.subtitle: Moo mananeo a khoebo a lahleheloang ke lebelo, tekanyetso le khokahano ea leano

approach.title: Mokhoa oa Boenjiniere
approach.subtitle: Mokhoa oa ho fetola litlhoko tse sa utloahaleng hore e be liforomo tse itokiselitseng tlhahiso

principles.title: Melao-motheo ea meralo
principles.subtitle: Etsa liqeto tse bolokang lits'ebetso tsa khoebo li lula li le teng

capabilities.title: Seo re se hahang
capabilities.subtitle: Bokhoni bo felletseng ba nts'etsopele ea software

technology.title: Stack ea rona ea theknoloji
technology.subtitle: Theknoloji ea sejoale-joale, e netefalitsoeng bakeng sa phano ea khoebo

breakdown.title: Ho senyeha ha ts'ebeletso
breakdown.subtitle: Tsela e hlophisitsoeng ho tloha ho sibolloeng ho isa ho phano e tsitsitseng ea tlhahiso

problem.overview: Lihlopha tsa khoebo hangata li tsamaisa ts'ebetso ea bohlokoa lits'ebetsong tse arohaneng, ho theha linako tse telele tsa ho etella pele, data e sa lumellaneng, le khokahano e turang ea matsoho lipakeng tsa mafapha.
problem.impactSignalsTitle: Seo baetapele ba atisang ho se bona
painPoints: Boitlamo ba phano bo theoha hobane ho itšetleha ka lihlopha ha ho laoloe
Mohopolo oa mantlha oa khoebo o pheta-pheta ho pholletsa le liteishene le lihlahisoa
Ho kopanngoa ha lefa ho etsa hore likarolo tse ncha li be kotsi ebile li lieha
impactSignals: Roadmap throughput e theoha ha tšebeliso ea boenjiniere e ntse e eketseha
Liphoso tse tobaneng le bareki li eketseha nakong ea tokollo
Ho etsa liqeto ho lieha ka lebaka la ho se lumellane ha litlaleho tsa ts'ebetso

approach.overview: Re etsa ka ho sibolloa ha meralo ea pele, phano e tsamaisoang ke konteraka, le boenjiniere bo laoloang ba tokollo e le hore boleng ba khoebo bo romelloe ka li-increments tse ka boleloang esale pele.

pillars.title: Domain Modeling & Bounded Contexts
pillars.detail: Re etsa 'mapa oa libaka ho hlakola meeli ea ts'ebeletso ho fokotsa khokahano ea lihlopha le ho hlakisa beng ba eona.

pillars.title: API-First Integration Strategy
pillars.detail: Re hlalosa likonteraka tse tsitsitseng kapele, ho nolofalletsa nts'etsopele e ts'oanang le kopanyo e sireletsehileng le lits'ebetso tsa khoebo.

pillars.title: Tsoelo-pele ea Phano ea Ts'ebetso
pillars.detail: Re sebelisa lifolakha tsa tšobotsi, mekhahlelo e hlophisitsoeng, le liheke tsa boleng ho lokolla kapele ntle le ho sitisa tlhahiso.

principles.overview: Liqeto tsa rona tsa meralo li beha pele bophelo bo bolelele, ts'ebetso le beng ba hlakileng e le hore liforomo li lule li ikamahanya le maemo ha boholo ba khoebo bo ntse bo hola.

items.title: Meeli ea Modular Service
items.detail: Bokhoni bo kopantsoe ho potoloha libaka tsa khoebo ho boloka tšusumetso ea phetoho sebakeng seo.

items.title: Kopanyo e tsamaisoang ke ketsahalo
items.detail: Li-workflows tsa asynchronous li sebelisoa moo mamello ea latency e leng teng ho ntlafatsa botsitso le ho arola lits'ebetso.

items.title: Observability by Design
items.detail: Ho latela, metriki le litlaleho tse hlophisitsoeng li hlalosoa esale pele ho ts'ehetsa ts'ebetso e tšepahalang le taolo ea SLA.

breakdown.title: Ho sibolloa le meralo
breakdown.summary: Re etsa 'mapa oa lintho tse tlang pele khoebong, lithibelo tsa tekheniki le meralo ea sepheo pele ts'ebetsong e qala.
deliverables: Workshop ea Tlhahiso le Tlhokahalo ea Ts'ebetso
Moralo oa meralo ea tharollo
Moralo oa phano o thehiloeng ho Milestone-based

breakdown.title: Kaho le Kopanyo
breakdown.summary: Lihlopha tsa rona li kenya tšebetsong likarolo tsa mantlha, likarolo tsa kopanyo le ts'ireletso ea boleng ka mokhoa o ts'oanang.
deliverables: Sebopeho sa li-sprints tsa iterative
API le likopanyo tsa motho oa boraro
Tlhahlobo e ikemetseng le tlhahlobo ea ho itokisetsa tokollo

breakdown.title: Ho qala le ho iphetola ha lintho
breakdown.summary: Kamora ho phela, re tsitsisa ts'ebetso mme re hlalosa potoloho e latelang ea ntlafatso ho ipapisitse le ts'ebeliso ea 'nete.
deliverables: Production rollout runbook
Ts'ebetso le ts'epahalo
Tsela ea morao-rao le ntlafatso ea morao-rao

cta.title: Na u se u itokiselitse ho theha kopo ea hau e latelang?
cta.description: Ha re raleng le ho romella tharollo e tsamaisang liphetho tsa khoebo tse ka lekanngoang.

hero.title: AI, ML le Bohlale ba Khoebo
hero.description: Ho tloha mefuteng e boletsoeng esale pele ho ea ho li-dashboard tsa phethahatso, re aha litsamaiso tse felletseng tsa AI / BI tse tšehetsang liqeto ka boholo.

problem.title: Bothata ba Khoebo
problem.subtitle: Hobaneng ha lik'hamphani tse ruileng tsa data li ntse li sokola ho etsa liqeto tse tšepahalang

approach.title: Mokhoa oa Boenjiniere
approach.subtitle: Kamoo re sebelisang lihlahisoa tsa data, mefuta ea ML le li-workflows tsa BI

principles.title: Melao-motheo ea meralo
principles.subtitle: Mekhoa ea data le meralo ea mohlala bakeng sa bohlale bo tšepahalang ba liqeto

capabilities.title: Bokhoni ba rona
capabilities.subtitle: Tharollo e felletseng ea AI, ML le BI

technology.title: Stack ea rona ea theknoloji
technology.subtitle: Lisebelisoa tse etelletseng pele tsa indasteri bakeng sa data le AI

breakdown.title: Ho senyeha ha ts'ebeletso
breakdown.subtitle: Mokhoa oa ho tloha ho data e arohaneng ho ea ho bohlale ba tlhahiso

problem.overview: Mekhatlo hangata e bokella lintlha tse ngata empa e hloleha ho e fetolela ponelopele e tšepahalang, liqeto tsa ts'ebetso, kapa ketso ea khoebo e ka lekanngoang.
problem.impactSignalsTitle: Seo baetapele ba atisang ho se bona
painPoints: Tlhaloso ea ho tlaleha e fapana ho lihlopha, e leng se hlahisang lipale tse hanyetsanang tsa KPI
Mehlala e ntse e le litekong 'me ha ho mohla e fihlelang ts'ebetso ea tlhahiso
Litaba tsa boleng ba data li senya ts'epo ho li-analytics le li-dashboard tsa phethahatso
impactSignals: Lipotoloho tsa liqeto li lieha hobane lihlopha li ngangisana ka bonnete ba data ho fapana le ketso
Ho nepahala ha ponelopele le ho hlophisa ho lula ho sa lumellane kotara ho feta kotara
Matsete a Analytics a bonts'a kamohelo e tlase kantle ho lihlopha tse ikhethang tsa bahlahlobi

approach.overview: Re fana ka liforomo tsa AI le BI joalo ka lits'ebetso tsa tlhahiso, ho kopanya boenjiniere ba data, ts'ebetso ea bophelo ba mohlala, le kopanyo ea ts'ebetso ea liqeto.

pillars.title: Motheo oa Lihlahisoa tsa Data
pillars.detail: Lihlahisoa tsa data tse lumellanang le domain li theha lisebelisoa tse ka sebelisoang hape, tse laoloang le tsa boleng bo holimo bakeng sa li-analytics le ML.

pillars.title: MLOps Lifecycle Automation
pillars.detail: Koetliso, ho tsamaisoa, ho lekola le ho tsamaisa li iketsa ho boloka mehlala e ts'epahala tlhahisong.

pillars.title: Decision Workflow Integration
pillars.detail: Temohisiso e kentsoe ka har'a lisebelisoa tsa ts'ebetso le li-dashboard kahoo lihlopha li sebetsa ka bohlale ka har'a lits'ebetso tsa letsatsi le letsatsi.

principles.overview: Meralo ea rona ea AI / BI e beha pele lintlha tse tšepahalang, mehlala e hlalositsoeng, le mekhoa e laoloang ea phihlello ho pholletsa le khoebo.

items.title: Tlhaloso ea metric e le 'ngoe
items.detail: Li-KPI tsa bohlokoa li hlalosoa hang ka mefuta e arolelanoang ea semantic ho felisa mohopolo o hanyetsanang oa ho tlaleha.

items.title: Model Reliability Controls
items.detail: Meeli ea ts'ebetso, ho lemoha drift le mekhoa ea ho khutlisa e sireletsa boleng ba liqeto tlhahisong.

items.title: Ts'ireletso le Tsamaiso ka Moralo
items.detail: Mohala oa data, phihlello e thehiloeng ho boikarabello, le taolo e itokiselitseng ho hlahlojoa li kentsoe ka har'a phaephe e ngoe le e ngoe.

capabilities: Mefuta ea ho ithuta ka mochini le lipeipi
Phallo ea data ea nako ea 'nete

breakdown.title: Motheo oa Data
breakdown.summary: Re lekola mehloli, re hlalosa likonteraka tsa data, mme re theha taolo e le hore mohlala o mong le o mong o qale ka lisebelisoa tse tšepahalang.
deliverables: Mohloli oa data le tlhahlobo ea boleng
Sebopeho sa boenjiniere le moralo oa schema
Motheo oa Ts'ireletso le Tsamaiso

breakdown.title: Model & Insight Delivery
breakdown.summary: Re haha mehlala le li-dashboard tsa liqeto tse hokahantsoeng le lipotso tsa khoebo tse ka lekanngoang le li-KPI.
deliverables: Nts'etsopele ea mohlala le netefatso
Li-dashboard tsa phethahatso le litlaleho tsa ts'ebetso
Kopanyo ea ts'ebetso ea liqeto

breakdown.title: MLOps & Adoption
breakdown.summary: Re kenya tšebetsong ts'ebetso, ho lekola le ho nolofalletsa sehlopha ho boloka liphetho li ts'epahala ha nako e ntse e tsamaea.
deliverables: Lipeipi tse ikemetseng tsa ho tsamaisa lipeipi
Drift, ho nepahala le ho lekola ts'ebeliso
Sehlopha sa ho tsamaisa le ho sebetsa playbook

cta.title: Fetola data ea hau hore e be temohisiso
cta.description: Fetola data e arohaneng hore e be bohlale bo hlakileng, bo ka sebelisoang

hero.title: Cloud Architecture & Infrastructure
hero.description: Liforomo tsa maru a mangata, meralo e tsitsitseng le meralo ea motheo e etselitsoeng kholo ea nako e telele.

problem.title: Bothata ba Khoebo
problem.subtitle: Hobaneng ha merero ea leru e emisa kamora leqhubu la pele la ho falla

approach.title: Mokhoa oa Boenjiniere
approach.subtitle: Mokhoa oa ho aha li-platform tsa leru tse sireletsehileng, tse nang le kotsi e laoloang ea ho falla

principles.title: Melao-motheo ea meralo
principles.subtitle: Liqeto tsa sethala tse lekanyang bokhoni, botsitso le taolo

capabilities.title: Litšebeletso tsa Cloud
capabilities.subtitle: Ho theha, ho kenya le ho kenya lifaele ka har'a leru

breakdown.title: Ho senyeha ha ts'ebeletso
breakdown.subtitle: Tatellano e hlakileng ea ho rala, ho falla le ho sebelisa liforomo tsa leru

problem.overview: Mekhatlo e mengata e phethela ho falla ha pele ha leru empa e ntse e sebetsa joalo ka lihlopha tsa sebaka, tse nang le ponahalo e mpe, taolo e sa lumellaneng le tšebeliso e ntseng e eketseha.
problem.impactSignalsTitle: Seo baetapele ba atisang ho se bona
painPoints: Ts'ebetso ea ts'ireletso e tsamaisoa ntle le ts'ireletso e tloaelehileng le taolo ea marang-rang
Litšenyehelo tsa leru li hola ka potlako ho feta boleng ba khoebo bo fanoeng
Phepelo ea tikoloho e lula e le ea matsoho ebile e sa lumellane ho lihlopha tsohle
impactSignals: Liketsahalo tse atisang ho bakoa ke ho kheloha ha tlhophiso lipakeng tsa tikoloho
Boikemisetso ba tlhahlobo bo fokotseha ka lebaka la mekhoa e arohaneng ea taolo
Infrastructure lead times delay product and data initiatives

approach.overview: Re rala liforomo tsa leru e le lihlahisoa, re sebelisa boiketsetso ba meralo ea motheo, litšireletso tsa leano le maqhubu a ho falla a lumellanang le ho nyatsa khoebo.

pillars.title: Landing Zone as Code
pillars.detail: Boitsebahatso, marang-rang, ts'ireletso le metheo ea maano li hlophisitsoe bakeng sa ho pheta-pheta le ho hlahlojoa.

pillars.title: Leano la ho falla le thehiloeng ho maqhubu
pillars.detail: Mesebetsi ea mosebetsi e tsamaea ka mekhahlelo e laoloang ka tatellano ea ho itšetleha le ho itokisetsa ho khutlisa.

pillars.title: SRE + FinOps Operating Loop
pillars.detail: Lits'oants'o tsa ts'epahalo le moruo oa yuniti li hlahlojoa hammoho ho ntlafatsa nako ea ho qetela le ts'ebetso ea tšebeliso.

principles.overview: Mohlala oa rona oa meralo ea meralo o rata meralo ea motheo e phatlalatsoang, phihlello e fokolang, le liforomo tse ka hlophisitsoeng tse ts'ehetsang phano e potlakileng ea lihlahisoa.

items.title: Mekhoa e sa fetoheng ea meralo ea motheo
items.detail: Tikoloho e hahiloe bocha ho tsoa ho khoutu e fetotsoeng ho fokotsa ho phatloha le ho nolofatsa ho hlaphoheloa ha ts'ebetso.

items.title: Motheo oa Ts'ireletso ka Default
items.detail: Taolo ea phihlello ea zero-trust le ts'ebetsong ea maano li kenyelelitsoe tikolohong e ngoe le e ngoe ea bophelo.

items.title: Mamello ka ho aba
items.detail: Mesebetsi ea bohlokoa e etselitsoe mamello ea ho hloleha ha libaka tse ngata kapa libaka tse ngata moo tšusumetso ea khoebo e e hlokang.

capabilities: Litšebeletso tsa ho falla ha leru
Moralo o phahameng oa ho fumaneha

breakdown.title: Architecture & Landing Zone
breakdown.summary: Re hlalosa boemo bo shebiloeng, li-guardrails le litekanyetso tsa motheo tsa sethala pele mosebetsi o tsamaea.
deliverables: Moralo oa meralo ea leru
Boitsebahatso, marang-rang le motheo oa ts'ireletso
Litšenyehelo le litšireletso tsa ho latela

breakdown.title: Migration & Platform Build
breakdown.summary: Re etsa maqhubu a ho falla le ho emisa likarolo tsa sethala sa leru ka boiketsetso bo pheta-phetoang.
deliverables: Workload migration sequencing
Ho hlongoa ha sethala le sethala se se nang seva
Infrastructure e le li-module tsa khoutu

breakdown.title: Ho tšepahala le FinOps
breakdown.summary: Re ntlafatsa ts'epahalo ea ts'ebetso mme re lula re ntlafatsa ts'ebeliso ea leru e ipapisitse le telemetry e phelang.
deliverables: SLOs, ho lekola le ho tsamaisa liketsahalo
Ho mamella le ho hlaphoheloa ha likoluoa
Litšenyehelo tsa ntlafatso ea litšenyehelo le cadence ea taolo

cta.title: Eketsa meralo ea hau ea motheo
cta.description: Theha metheo ea leru e lulang e tsitsitse tlasa mojaro oa lefats'e la 'nete.
cta.button: Rera leano la hau la leru

hero.title: Boenjiniere ba DevOps le Platform
hero.description: Lipeipi tsa phano tse ikemetseng, ho shebella le mekhoa ea sethala e ntlafatsang lebelo ntle le ho tela ts'epahalo.

problem.title: Bothata ba Khoebo
problem.subtitle: Hobaneng ha lebelo la phano le theoha ha ho rarahana ha sethala ho ntse ho eketseha

approach.title: Mokhoa oa Boenjiniere
approach.subtitle: Mokhoa oa ho hlophisa lipeipi tsa phano ntle le ho liehisa lihlopha tsa lihlahisoa

principles.title: Melao-motheo ea meralo
principles.subtitle: Mekhoa ea boenjiniere ba sethala e eketsang ts'epahalo le boipuso ba sehlopha

capabilities.title: Litšebeletso tsa DevOps
capabilities.subtitle: Iketse, lekola le ho ntlafatsa potoloho ea hau ea bophelo ba thomello

technology.title: Lisebelisoa tsa DevOps le li-platform
technology.subtitle: Molemo ka ho fetisisa DevOps toolchain

breakdown.title: Ho senyeha ha ts'ebeletso
breakdown.subtitle: 'Mapa o sebetsang ho tloha ho litšitiso tsa phano ho ea ho phallo e phahameng ea tokollo

problem.overview: Mekhatlo hangata e tsetela ho lisebelisoa tsa CI / CD empa e ntse e loantšana le litokollo tse sa tsitsang, tumello e liehang le beng ba arohaneng libakeng tsohle.
problem.impactSignalsTitle: Seo baetapele ba atisang ho se bona
painPoints: Litlhaloso tsa lipeipi li fapana ka sehlopha, li theha liheke tsa boleng bo sa lumellaneng
Tumello ea ho romelloa ka letsoho e lieha ho hotfix le nako ea ho lokolloa ha likarolo
Liketsahalo tsa ts'ebetso li pheta-pheta hobane telemetry ha e phethahale kapa e siloe
impactSignals: Nako ea ho etella pele bakeng sa liphetoho e ntse e eketseha ho sa tsotellehe tšebeliso ea boiketsetso
Phetoho ea sekhahla sa ho hloleha nakong ea phano e phahameng ea bophahamo ba modumo
Tlhahiso ea moqapi e fokotseha ka lebaka la khohlano ea lisebelisoa le phetoho ea moelelo

approach.overview: Re theha mohlala oa sethala sa moqapi oa kahare o nang le litempele tsa lipeipi tse ka sebelisoang hape, taolo e tsamaisoang ke leano le ho shebella bophelo bo felletseng.

pillars.title: Golden Path Pipeline Templates
pillars.detail: Meralo ea CI / CD e ka sebelisoang hape e lekanya kaho, liteko, licheke tsa ts'ireletso le ts'ebetso ea ts'ebetso.

pillars.title: Platform API & Self-Service
pillars.detail: Lihlopha li fana ka tikoloho le ho lokolla meralo ea motheo ka li-interface tse laoloang tsa boits'ebeletso.

pillars.title: Ho tšepahala ha maikutlo a Feedback Loops
pillars.detail: Mekhoa ea liketsahalo, bophelo bo botle ba SLO le telemetry ea ts'ebetso e tsebisa ntlafatso e tsoelang pele ea ts'ebetso le meralo.

principles.overview: Meralo ea rona ea DevOps e hokahanya lebelo la phano le taolo ka ho iketsetsa taolo le ho fokotsa ts'ebetso e le 'ngoe.

items.title: Ntho e 'ngoe le e' ngoe e le mofuta oa Phetolelo
items.detail: Lipeipi, meralo ea motheo le melao ea leano li laoloa taolong ea mohloli bakeng sa ho hlahlojoa le ho pheta-pheta.

items.title: Netefatso e tsoelang pele
items.detail: Licheke tsa boleng, ts'ireletso le ts'ebetso li behiloe mekhahlelong eohle ho lemoha kotsi pejana.

items.title: Boikarabello ba sethala se arolelanoang
items.detail: Lihlopha tsa sethala li fana ka bokhoni ba ho tsamaisa thepa ha lihlopha tsa lihlahisoa li boloka beng ba phano ea thepa.

breakdown.title: Tlhahlobo ea Sethala
breakdown.summary: Re lekola ketane ea hau ea hajoale ea phano ea software ho khetholla lintlha tsa kotsi le lithibelo tsa lebelo.
deliverables: 'Mapa oa Current State Delivery Workflow
Tlhahlobo ea lipeipi
Target DevOps maturity roadmap

breakdown.title: Pipeline & Automation Build
breakdown.summary: Re kenya tšebetsong CI / CD e tšepahalang, liheke tsa boleng, le boiketsetso ba meralo ea motheo bakeng sa litokollo tse sa fetoheng.
deliverables: Li-template tsa CI / CD tse ka sebelisoang hape
Infrastructure le tikoloho automation
Liteko tse ikemetseng le taolo ea tokollo

breakdown.title: Sebetsa le ho ntlafatsa
breakdown.summary: Re theha li-loops tsa ho shebella le tsa taolo tse ts'ehetsang ntlafatso e tsoelang pele ea phano.
deliverables: Ho lekola li-dashboard le maano a tlhokomeliso
Ho lokolloa ha taolo le liketsahalo tsa lipapali
Metrics ea ntlafatso e tsoelang pele le litlhahlobo

cta.title: Potlakisa phano ea hau
cta.description: Fokotsa khohlano ea tokollo le ho ntlafatsa ts'epahalo ka mekhoa e holileng ea DevOps.

hero.title: Phetoho ea dijithale le leano
hero.description: Ts'ehetso ea boeletsi le ts'ehetso ea ts'ebetso ho ntlafatsa lipolanete, lihlopha le mefuta ea ts'ebetso.

problem.title: Bothata ba Khoebo
problem.subtitle: Moo mananeo a phetoho a lahleheloang ke matla le boits'epo ba phethahatso

capabilities.title: Litšebeletso tsa Boeletsi
capabilities.subtitle: Tataiso ea Leano la Katleho ea Digital

approach.title: Mokhoa oa Boenjiniere
approach.subtitle: Mokhoa oa ho fetolela leano hore e be phetoho e tšehelitsoeng ke theknoloji

principles.title: Melao-motheo ea meralo
principles.subtitle: Mohlala oa ts'ebetso le likhetho tsa sethala tse sireletsang liphetho tsa phetoho

technology.title: Stack ea Theknoloji
technology.subtitle: Li-platform le meralo eo re e sebelisang ho etsa phetoho

breakdown.title: Ho senyeha ha ts'ebeletso
breakdown.subtitle: Phetoho e hlophisitsoeng ho tloha ho tlhaloso ea leano ho ea ho boleng ba khoebo bo ka lekanngoang

problem.overview: Merero ea dijithale hangata e qala ka sepheo se matla empa e hloleha ho fetoha liphetho tsa phano ka lebaka la beng ba sa hlakang, lisebelisoa tse sa hokahaneng le lintho tse tlang pele ho qothisana lehlokoa.
problem.impactSignalsTitle: Seo baetapele ba atisang ho se bona
painPoints: Limmapa tsa litsela tsa phetoho li hlalosoa empa ha li fetoleloe tsamaisong ea phano
Lintho tse tlang pele khoebong le boenjiniere li fapane kamora mekhahlelo ea pele ea moralo
Mekhoa ea ts'ebetso ea lefa e thibela ho amoheloa ha mekhoa ea sejoale-joale ea phano ea lihlahisoa
impactSignals: Ts'ebeliso ea lenaneo e nyoloha ha mokhatlo oa leano la KPI o lula o bataletse
Merero e lahleheloa ke lintlha tsa handoff lipakeng tsa leano, meralo le ts'ebetso
Lihlopha li na le mokhathala oa phetoho o nang le boleng bo fokolang ba khoebo

approach.overview: Re kopanya boeletsi ba leano le meralo ea phano, ho hokahanya moralo oa mohlala oa ts'ebetso, bokhoni ba sethala le cadence ea ts'ebetso ho potoloha lipheo tse ka lekanngoang.

pillars.title: Value Stream Prioritization
pillars.detail: Re latellana mehato e ipapisitse le tšusumetso e ka lekanngoang ea khoebo le lithibelo tsa ho itšetleha ka tekheniki.

pillars.title: Moralo oa Mohlala oa Ts'ebetso ea Sepheo
pillars.detail: Boikarabello, taolo le litokelo tsa liqeto li hlalosoa ho ts'ehetsa ts'ebetso e potlakileng ho lihlopha tsa khoebo le theknoloji.

pillars.title: Tsamaiso ea Phano ea Portfolio
pillars.detail: Tsoelo-pele ea phetoho e laoloa ka lintlha tsa ho hlahloba tse amanang le KPI le taolo ea likotsi tsa potefolio.

principles.overview: Meralo ea rona ea phetoho e totobatsa ntlafatso e eketsehileng le boikarabello bo hlakileng, ho qoba ho ngoloa bocha ntle le mabaka a khoebo.

items.title: Ho hokahanya Bokhoni ba Khoebo
items.detail: Liphetoho tsa theknoloji li hlophisitsoe ho potoloha bokhoni bo amanang ka kotloloho le lekeno, boleng ba ts'ebeletso kapa ts'ebetso ea litšenyehelo.

items.title: Composable Platform Strategy
items.detail: Likarolo tsa sethala li khethiloe bakeng sa tšebelisano 'moho ho ts'ehetsa ho falla ha mekhahlelo le ho ikamahanya le maemo ka potlako.

items.title: Tsamaiso e nang le Delivery Cadence
items.detail: Liforamo tsa liqeto le lintlha tsa taolo li kentsoe ka har'a potoloho ea sprint le kotara, ha li tšoaroe e le lipina tse arohaneng tsa bureaucratic.

breakdown.title: Leano la Alignment
breakdown.summary: Re hokahanya lintho tse tlang pele tsa boetapele le lipheo tsa dijithale ho theha tataiso e arolelanoeng ea phetoho.
deliverables: Lipheo tsa phetoho le litekanyetso tsa katleho
Tlhahlobo ea bokhoni le tlhahlobo ea lekhalo
Portfolio ea Priority Initiative

breakdown.title: Moralo oa Phethahatso
breakdown.summary: Re hlalosa mohlala oa ts'ebetso o shebiloeng, litekanyetso tsa meralo le tatellano ea ts'ebetsong ea mekhahlelo.
deliverables: Mohlala oa ts'ebetso le moralo oa taolo
Litekanyetso tsa Theknoloji le Ts'ebetso ea Ts'ebetso
Phased implementation roadmap

breakdown.title: Phetoho le Phethahatso ea Boleng
breakdown.summary: Re khanna ho amoheloa, ho lekola motsamao oa KPI, le ho ntlafatsa merero e ipapisitseng le liphetho tsa phano.
deliverables: Moralo oa ho amohela le ho nolofalletsa
Cadence ea ho lekanya KPI
Quarterly optimization backlog

cta.title: Qala leeto la hau la phetoho
cta.description: Tsamaisa liphetoho ka lintho tse tlang pele tse hlakileng le meralo e sebetsang ea phano
cta.button: Kemiso ea Seboka sa Leano la Tsamaiso

hero.title: IoT & Edge Computing
hero.description: Litsamaiso tse hokahaneng ho tloha sesebelisoa ho ea ho leru, ka lipeipi tsa telemetry le bohlale ba bohale bakeng sa tekanyo ea indasteri.

problem.title: Bothata ba Khoebo
problem.subtitle: Hobaneng ha mananeo a lisebelisoa tse hokahaneng a hloleha ho nyoloha ho feta li-pilots deployments

approach.title: Mokhoa oa Boenjiniere
approach.subtitle: Mokhoa oa ho rala litsamaiso tse sireletsehileng, tse sebetsang tsa IoT ho tloha ho firmware ea sesebelisoa ho ea ho li-API tsa leru

principles.title: Melao-motheo ea meralo
principles.subtitle: Melao ea moralo oa Edge-to-Cloud bakeng sa ho tšepahala, latency le taolo ea likepe

capabilities.title: Litharollo tsa IoT
capabilities.subtitle: Hokela, lekola le ho ntlafatsa lisebelisoa tsa hau

technology.title: IoT Technology Stack
technology.subtitle: Ho tloha ho Hardware ho ea Lerung

breakdown.title: Ho senyeha ha ts'ebeletso
breakdown.subtitle: Mokhoa oa ho tsamaisa lits'ebetso tse hokahaneng ho tloha ho lisebelisoa tsa bohale ho ea ho bohlale ba leru

problem.overview: Boiteko ba IoT hangata bo paka bokhoni ba tekheniki ho bafofisi ba lifofane empa bo hloleha ka lebaka la khokahano e sa tšepahaleng, taolo e fokolang ea likepe le kopanyo e mpe le ts'ebetso ea khoebo.
problem.impactSignalsTitle: Seo baetapele ba atisang ho se bona
painPoints: Ts'ebetso ea ts'ebetso ea ts'ebetso le ts'ebetso ea
Lipeipi tsa telemetry li hlahisa data ea ts'ebetso e lerata, e sa phethahalang kapa e liehang
Lintlafatso tsa taolo e hole le lintlafatso tsa firmware li hlahisa kotsi ea polokeho le ts'ireletso
impactSignals: Libaka tsa mofofisi li atleha, empa nako ea tlhahiso ea tlhahiso e thellela khafetsa
Lihlopha tsa ts'ebetso ea tšimo li arabela liketsahalong ntle le ponahalo e boletsoeng esale pele
Litsamaiso tsa khoebo li ke ke tsa sebelisa bohlale ba lisebelisoa ka nako ea 'nete

approach.overview: Re theha liforomo tsa IoT joalo ka lits'ebetso tse laoloang tse ajoang, ho kopanya litekanyetso tse sireletsehileng tsa nako ea ts'ebetso, ho kenngoa ha liketsahalo, le taolo ea ts'ebetso ka tekanyo ea likepe.

pillars.title: Tsamaiso e sireletsehileng ea bophelo ba sesebelisoa
pillars.detail: Ho fana ka liphetho, boitsebahatso, ho potoloha ha senotlolo le lintlafatso tsa firmware li iketsa ho fokotsa kotsi ea ts'ebetso.

pillars.title: Mohaho oa Telemetry o tsamaisoang ke ketsahalo
pillars.detail: Lipeipi tse phallelang li tloaela, li netefatsa le ho tsamaisa liketsahalo tsa lisebelisoa bakeng sa li-analytics le taolo ka nako ea nnete.

pillars.title: Sefofane sa Taolo ea Ts'ebetso ea Fleet
pillars.detail: Ho lekola, ho lemosa le ho tsamaisa litaelo tse hole ho fana ka taolo e tšepahalang ho thepa e abeloeng.

principles.overview: Meralo ea rona ea IoT e leka-lekanya liqeto tse tlase tsa latency le taolo e bohareng, ho shebella le ho latela ts'ireletso.

items.title: Edge Autonomy with Cloud Coordination
items.detail: Ts'ebetso ea bohlokoa ea lehae e ntse e tsoela pele nakong ea ho senyeha ha marang-rang ha e ntse e hokahanya boemo le litsamaiso tsa leru ha li fumaneha.

items.title: Contracted Event Schemas
items.detail: Lihlopha tsa lisebelisoa le sethala li sebelisa li-schemas tse laoloang ho boloka botsitso ba telemetry ho pholletsa le liphetolelo.

items.title: Ts'ireletso ea Sesebelisoa sa Zero-Trust
items.detail: Netefatso e kopanetsoeng, tokelo e nyane, le lipalangoang tse patiloeng li qobelloa tšebelisano e ngoe le e ngoe ea sesebelisoa.

breakdown.title: Leano la Sesebelisoa le Edge
breakdown.summary: Re hlalosa mekhoa ea khokahano, litekanyetso tsa nako ea ho matha le phepelo e sireletsehileng bakeng sa lisebelisoa tsa tšimo.
deliverables: Sesebelisoa sa ho kenella le khokahano
Edge runtime le ho tsamaisa moralo
Motheo oa ts'ireletso ea likepe

breakdown.title: Telemetry & Control Plane
breakdown.summary: Re haha lipeipi tse ts'oereng liketsahalo, ho etsisa mafahla a dijithale, le ho nolofalletsa ts'ebetso ea taolo e hole.
deliverables: Moralo oa nako ea 'nete le moralo oa ketsahalo
Digital Twin le Asset Model Implementation
Command & Control API Layer

breakdown.title: Ts'ebetso le Scale
breakdown.summary: Re kenya tšebetsong taolo ea likepe le taolo ea ts'epahalo bakeng sa tikoloho ea IoT ea tlhahiso.
deliverables: Lisebelisoa tsa ho lekola le ho lemosa
Ts'ireletso ea Ts'ireletso ea Ts'ire
Moralo oa ts'ehetso le ts'ehetso ea bophelo

cta.title: Hokela lisebelisoa tsa hau
cta.description: Theha tharollo e tšepahalang ea IoT e itokiselitseng tikoloho ea 'nete ea tlhahiso.
cta.button: Qala projeke ea hau ea IoT
